sources.title: THE BIG SLEEP: HUMPHREY BOGART
sources.description: HUMPHREY BOGART as Phillip Marlow Private Dick. Based on The Big Sleep 1939 novel by Raymond Chandler

metadata.Plot: P.I. Philip Marlowe's hired by a wealthy general to find out and stop his daughter, Carmen from being blackmailed over gambling debts, Marlowe finds himself deep within a web of love triangles, blackmail, murder, gambling, and organised crime. With help from Vivian (another of the general's daughters), Marlowe hatches a plot to free the family from this web and trap the real culprit.
metadata.Writer: William Faulkner, Leigh Brackett, Jules Furthman
metadata.Actors: Humphrey Bogart, Lauren Bacall, John Ridgely
